summary: Tested 3 features: (1) Contact Provider from Marketplace - WORKING, (2) Auto-share Birth Plan UI notice - WORKING, (3) Invoices in Messages - WORKING. All 3 fixes verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Contact Provider) properly handles: (a) existing conversations - navigates directly, (b) new connections - sends pre-filled message, (c) no connection - shows helpful alert with option to go to My Team
Feature 2 (Auto-share Birth Plan) UI notice is present at bottom of birth-plan.tsx with correct text: 'Your birth plan is automatically shared with providers on your team when you save changes.'
Feature 3 (Invoices in Messages) now renders correctly with: invoice amount, description, status badge, due date, provider name, and payment disclaimer
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features from iteration 32 bug report are now fixed and verified. Feature 3 (Invoices in Messages) was the main fix - UI now renders pendingInvoices correctly. Features 1 and 2 were already working in iteration 32.

feature_1_contact_provider.details: Contact Provider button opens messages for existing connections. For new providers without connection, shows helpful alert explaining need to share birth plan first with option to navigate to My Team page. Pre-filled message template: 'Hi [name], I found you on True Joy Birthing and would love to learn more about working together.'
feature_1_contact_provider.api_test_result: 403 'You don't have an active connection with this provider' - expected behavior for unconnected providers

feature_2_auto_share_birth_plan.details: Auto-share notice is present on Birth Plan page. Text reads: 'Your birth plan is automatically shared with providers on your team when you save changes.' Located in action section at bottom of page.
feature_2_auto_share_birth_plan.code_location: birth-plan.tsx lines 269-275 - autoShareNotice View component with information-circle icon

feature_3_invoices_in_messages.details: Pending Invoices section now renders on Messages page. Shows: invoice amount ($500.00), description, status badge (Pending/Awaiting Payment), due date, provider name, and payment disclaimer. API returns correct invoice data.
feature_3_invoices_in_messages.api_response: Invoice with invoice_id, amount, description, status='Sent', due_date, provider_name confirmed
feature_3_invoices_in_messages.screenshot_evidence: Invoice card visible with $500.00, 'Birth Doula Support Services', 'From: Test Doula', 'Due: 3/20/2026'

mocked_apis_list: Subscription/payment processing is mocked - payments made directly to providers outside app
